Toolboxes

The Toolboxes and Toolbar in miraX provide tools for navigation, editing, measurement, visualization, and advanced analytical workflows.

Measurement

Tools for measuring spatial information directly on the map.

  • Distance
  • Area

Drawing & Editing

Tools for creating, annotating, and editing spatial features.

  • Add comments/annotations

  • Draw features
  • Editing tools

Analysis Tools

Analytical tools for terrain, raster, and temporal analysis.

  • Profile Tool
  • Raster comparison
  • Time lapse
  • Cross sections

Specialized Toolboxes

Advanced analytical modules available within miraX.

  • Geotools
  • Hydro-Met analysis
  • Flooding/Rewetting
  • Subsidence modeling

Some tools and analytical modules are only available to authorized users.

Tool Group Example Tools
Drawing & Editing Draw Features, Comments, Annotations
Analysis Profiles, Raster Comparison, Rewetting
Measurement Distance, Area
Specialized Toolboxes Hydro-Met, Geotools, Subsidence Modeling
